titleStmt.title: SII 37.508: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 508. (A.R. No. B 8 of 1943-44.) Nandavaram, Banganapalle Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab paved on the floor in the mukha-maṇḍapa of the Chauḍēśvari temple.
This is dated in the cyclic year Khara, Māgha ba. 2. However, on the basis of palaeography it may be assigned to the 17th century.

It registers a gift of land made by the Vidvanmahājanas of Nandavara-agrahāra to the artisans Yallā-batuḍu of Chinakoṭla and Timmā-batuḍu of Chāṁgalamaṟṟi for rendering service in the temple. It also specifies the rate of monthly wages in cash and kind to the labourers who were engaged in the work.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . khara saṁvvatsara māga ba 2 lu
śrīmadyajanādhi ṣaṭka¨rmaniratulayina naṁddavarā
Agrahāra sthitāśēṣavidvaṁnnu mahājanāluṁnnu cinakoṭla
yalābatuṁḍu cāṁgalamarri tiṁmābattuni gāriki
yiccina sarvamānyapugrāmaṁ māgrāmānanu cavuṁḍēśvaramma
nu śēśē nimityaṁ dēvastānamula panipāṭalu śēśēnimityaṁ
mīku sarvamānyaṁgānu kayipatervuparumaṭa maracēnu
kha 0 Ñ nu taṁguṭūri cervuku dakṣiṇaṁ ciṁtavāri bā
vikāḍa cēnu khaṁ . nnu vubhayaṁ staḷālu lōnu cēnu khaṁ A
kṣarālā padihēḍuṁ cēnu mīku kritāna sarvamānyapu
kamma yicivuṁṭēmi ganka Ākamma maryādanu padi
hēdumu cēnu sarvamānyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā
¨rkkastāyigānu naḍupagalavāraṁ cavuṁḍē
śvarama guḍiki pani bāṭalku nilicinapuḍu
vacipanulu śēyagalavāru cavuḍēśvaramma
pādālāna naḍupagalavāramani
yicina sarvamānyapu śāsanaṁ mīru
dēvastānamaṁdu panulu śēsina dinālku
panulu śēśinavāri ja 1 nela 1 ga 85 lekhanu
nnu bhatyaṁ ja 1 jnuma 1 lekha panulu śā
yagalavāraṁ cavuṁḍēśvaramma nī
ṁ pādālāna tappamu
śrī śrī jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 37.508 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
